data.name: Fucked by the Princesses of the Realm
data.detailed_description:
You get through the days however you can—looking for food, water, and maybe the slightest human touch.

One afternoon, while offering the last of your water to an old man drier than the desert—and apparently crazy—he pulls out a map and tells you a story that sounds like pure delirium:

Beyond the Red Valley, where four moons shine in the sky, there’s a kingdom still alive… and it’s only inhabited by women. No men. And not just any women: princesses.

You haven’t seen a female curve in so long that you don’t hesitate for a second—

you grab your erection, the map, and head straight there.

To your surprise… it was true.

A kingdom of storybook princesses… but with fire between their legs.

🛌 Anora

The sleepy princess. She loves being undressed, touched, and just gets fucked. She only opens her legs… and her mouth, if you give her a reason.

💰 Laylee

The greedy princess. She doesn’t give anything for free. If you want to touch her, pay with something that shines. She plays with you like a coin pouch: if you're worth it, she uses you. If you sparkle, she rides you.

☯️ Zariel

The fallen princess. Half submissive, half dominant. If you make her moan, she might let you take control. If not… she’ll ride you until you learn who's really on top.

🦊 Kira

The furry, curious princess. She’s never seen a naked man… Shame means nothing to her. She sniffs, licks, and rides what she likes.

And she really likes you.

❤️‍🔥 You know you have to choose your path… because your fuck depends on it.

FEATURES

  • Finally: animations! Some girls feature a special animated scene.

  • Visual Novel++ Format: Each girl has different story arcs that complete her own narrative.

  • No Censorship!: We've removed censorship from the images (we’ll add an option later to censor them as preferred).

  • Gallery: Fill an image album as you progress through the story and revisit the chapters you've completed.

  • Choose your path: Decide which girl to pursue as the story unfolds.

  • Flashback: Go back in the story at any time to change a decision or relive a moment.

  • Smooth Navigation: Choose whether text progresses automatically or skip it to reach your favorite part.

  • Immersive Audio: Including music, sound effects, voices, and "other effects." Adjust volume settings independently or mute everything.

PLEASE NOTE

  • All characters depicted and visually represented in this game are over 18 years old, and no real or identifiable minors were used in the production of this game.

  • Help us out! If you think you can improve the narrative in your language, feel free to send us your suggestions via email or message us on our Steam page.

  • We're still working on it: All updates and improvements we develop will be added to the game at no additional cost.

data.short_description: You live in Drosk, a dusty land... and where you don't throw any. One day, a crazy old man tells you that beyond the Red Valley there is a kingdom where only beautiful and hot women live. Without hesitation, you head straight for the steamy tale you've just been told, and you find out it's real.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 韓文, 日文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN XP/Vista/7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 Compatible Graphics Card
  • 儲存空間: 100 GB 可用空間
